message:
style(tokio-compat): rustfmt formatting for cancel, hyper_bridge, and lib modules

Applies rustfmt-standard formatting to the asupersync-tokio-compat crate:

- cancel.rs: Collapse single-expression match arms onto one line for
  BestEffort and Timeout CancellationMode handlers; collapse RawWaker
  construction in test helper.
- hyper_bridge.rs: Collapse unimplemented!() macro string onto one line;
  collapse Timer::reset signature to single line; reformat executor test
  type annotation.
- lib.rs: Expand AdapterError::InsufficientBudget struct pattern to
  multi-line for readability.

No behavioral changes — purely mechanical formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
